Logichow should the company management module work?12/06/2026 10:19

Publish to all staff

One click pushes the latest knowledge and settings to GitHub Pages. The staff link never changes.

Building file
○Connecting to GitHub
○Uploading
○Deploying
GitHub Pages connected
Staff link: https://mirandaob.github.io/uvg-knowledge/
⚠️
GitHub not connected
Complete setup below
1
Create a free GitHub account
github.com/signup
2
Create a public repository
github.com/new — name it e.g. uvg-knowledge, set to Public, tick Add README.
3
Enable GitHub Pages
Settings → Pages → Deploy from branch → main → / (root) → Save.
4
Create a personal access token
github.com/settings/tokens/new — name it, set No expiration, tick repo, Generate.
5
Enter details below
Fill in and click Save and connect.

Connect GitHub

Stored obfuscated in the file. Staff never see a setup screen — the assistant works immediately on first open.

Brand customisation

Customise the platform to match your organisation. Changes apply everywhere immediately.

Widget / embed code

Add the chat widget as a floating bubble on any webpage — including your existing Google Sites or GAS tools. Copy this code and paste it before the closing </body> tag on any page.

Claude API key (free tier)

Get your free key at console.anthropic.com → API Keys → Create Key. Starts with sk-ant-.

Change admin password
